refactor: adopt Microsoft.Extensions.AI agent thread pattern for per-user conversations

Replace the manual ConversationTurn round-trip with a proper agent thread:

- GunnarBotPrompts.cs: extract system prompt to shared static class (breaks
  circular dependency, single source of truth for all prompt strings)

- ConversationCache: now stores List<ChatMessage> per user (the agent thread)
  - GetOrCreateThread(userId)  seeds fresh thread with system prompt
  - TouchThread(userId, thread)  slides cache expiry, enforces max history trim
  - ClearThread(userId)  resets to fresh thread on next access
  - Cache key changed to 'agent-thread:{userId}'

- QueryService: refactored HandleQueryAsync to accept the live thread
  - Builds an ephemeral call-time snapshot: [persistent thread] +
    [product context system message] + [user message]
  - Product context is NOT stored in the thread (keeps history clean)
  - Appends user message + assistant response via thread.AddMessages(response)
  - ConversationTurn record removed  no longer needed

- MessageHandlerService / SlashCommandService: updated to use
  GetOrCreateThread / TouchThread / ClearThread API

commit.message:
feat: wire up Discord bot with full query pipeline (Sprint 1 & 2)

- Add Discord service layer (src/Chatbot/Discord/):
  - DiscordService: bot login, lifecycle, Ready/Disconnect event handling
  - DiscordOptions: configuration class for token, guild, rate limits, cache settings
  - MessageHandlerService: mention/DM handler with rate limiting and typing indicator
  - QueryService: full pipeline - embed query -> Qdrant semantic search -> LLM -> response
    with Gunnar brand system prompt and multi-turn conversation context support
  - SlashCommandService: /search, /recommend, /about, /quiz, /clear slash commands
    with interactive quiz flow for personalized product recommendations
  - ProductEmbedBuilder: rich Discord embeds with product image, price, lens options,
    features, tags, and direct product links
  - ConversationCache: per-user sliding-window conversation history (IMemoryCache)
  - RateLimiter: per-user sliding-window rate limiting

- Update Program.cs: register IChatClient (llama3.2), DiscordSocketClient,
  all Discord services, AddMemoryCache, and DiscordService as IHostedService
- Update apphost.cs: add llama3.2 chat model alongside nomic-embed-text embed model

Fix stack buffer overflow for ShortString value parameters in codegen (#569)

* Fix ShortString value parameter stack overflow in codegen (TREE_VAR_DECL and TREE_ARR_DECL paths)

ShortString value parameters were only allocated 8 bytes (pointer size) on the
stack, but kgpc_string_to_shortstring writes up to 256 bytes, causing stack
buffer overflow that corrupts saved rbp and return address.

Fix: For value ShortString parameters, allocate the full shortstring size and
generate a kgpc_shortstring_to_shortstring copy from the caller's buffer into
the local stack buffer at function entry. Do not set is_reference since the
slot now holds the actual data, not a pointer.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/Kreijstal/Pascal-Compiler/sessions/7097f6cb-8122-4016-a522-691eba6aebe8

Co-authored-by: Kreijstal <2415206+Kreijstal@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ShortString value parameter detection under {$H-} mode

The original fix only detected ShortString params when KgpcType or
inferred_type_tag was SHORTSTRING_TYPE. Under {$H-}, bare 'string'
parameters may have STRING_TYPE in the tree instead of SHORTSTRING_TYPE
due to type resolution issues. Added fallback detection:

1. Check inferred_type_tag == SHORTSTRING_TYPE from the tree's type field
2. Check cached_arg_type's type_alias for is_shortstring flag
3. Check if primitive STRING_TYPE has size > 8 (indicating fixed ShortString)

Also removed debug fprintf statements from the previous commit.

The pp.pas bootstrap now gets past ReadTimezoneFile (the original crash)
but hits a different SIGSEGV in tvihashlist.internalfind during compiler
initialization — this is a separate pre-existing bug.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/Kreijstal/Pascal-Compiler/sessions/58f92d65-757e-471a-8d6d-5bae9138a30c

Co-authored-by: Kreijstal <2415206+Kreijstal@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix regressions: exclude const ShortString params from value copy, add presave for register clobber

Two regressions were introduced by the ShortString value parameter fix:

1. const ShortString parameters were incorrectly treated as value params
   needing a local copy. In Pascal, const params are passed by reference
   (like var) and must NOT get a copy. Fixed by checking is_const_param
   in the TREE_VAR_DECL path.

2. The kgpc_shortstring_to_shortstring call at function entry clobbered
   subsequent parameter registers (e.g., %rsi holding the second param).
   Fixed by detecting value ShortString params in the prescan phase so
   the presave mechanism saves ALL register values before processing.

Both fixes verified: 864 compiler subtests + 224 FPC RTL subtests pass.

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/Kreijstal/Pascal-Compiler/sessions/62534271-a332-4345-9ffe-12001db10dcf

Add support for selecting between SurrealDb, SQLite, and InMemory storage
backends via a side config file (emulator-config.json), CLI --storage
option, or the Explorer settings page.

Configuration:
- Add StorageType enum (SurrealDb, Sqlite, InMemory)
- Add Storage property to EmulatorOptions
- Load emulator-config.json from executable directory at startup
- Add --storage CLI option to the start command
- Priority: appsettings.json < emulator-config.json < CLI args

Storage backends:
- InMemoryDocumentStore: ConcurrentDictionary-based, ephemeral
- SqliteDocumentStore: Microsoft.Data.Sqlite, single-file persistence
- SqliteChangeFeedProvider: persistent change feed in SQLite
- InMemory/SQLite activity and query telemetry stores
- DocumentStoreHelpers: shared logic for partition keys, patches, etc.
- StorageServiceRegistration: DI dispatch based on StorageType

Explorer settings UI:
- Storage Configuration card with backend dropdown and data directory
- GET/PUT /api/emulator/config endpoint for emulator-config.json
- Restart-required messaging after saving storage changes
- Storage type shown in the Configuration info card
